message:
🌱 etcd: etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header field value (#1945)

* 🌱 Add etcd: etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add etcd: etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-13192-etcd-client-v3-v3-5-0-sends-invalid-authority-header-field-value",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header field value",
+    "description": "etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header field value. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current etcd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your etcd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nhelm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working etcd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\nStarting from etcd v3.5.0, etcd client v3 sends invalid `:authority` header field value which violates RFC."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header…",
+        "description": "This doesn't fully fix authority in multiple endpoint scenario, but\nshould at least fixes single endpoint scenario.\n```yaml\nBut now with the v3.5.0, it sends like this:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"etcd client v3 v3.5.0 sends invalid `:authority` header…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This doesn't fully fix authority in multiple endpoint scenario, but\nshould at least fixes single endpoint scenario.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "But now with the v3.5.0, it sends like this:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "etcd",
+      "graduated",
+      "orchestration",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "etcd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/13192",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/pull/13359"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-03T06:32:29.514Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
